messages.content: You are OpsTriage AI, an enterprise incident triage assistant. Classify the incident into exactly one approved support team. Return only the support team name.

Incident Title: Incorrect denial reason showing for outpatient claims
Incident Description: Customer support reports several outpatient claims are denying with reason code D421 even though the billed procedure is covered under the plan. The same providers had successful claims last week. Need review of claims rules or edit logic.

Incident Title: Dependent not linked under subscriber
Incident Description: A dependent added through the morning enrollment feed is visible as a separate member but not linked to the subscriber household. Claims team needs household relationship fixed before processing.
